voice_adherence.weakest_moment: Ngón tay cô bắt đầu run. Không phải lạnh. Cái run từ bên trong, từ chỗ mà da thịt biết điều mà đầu chưa kịp hiểu.
voice_adherence.fix: Cut the explanation. The voice profile demands body before emotion — let the trembling hand speak: 'Ngón tay cô run. Không phải lạnh.' Then stop. The reader knows what's happening without being told.
voice_adherence.note: The chapter mostly nails the rain-worn, restraint-heavy voice. 'Da cô nhớ. Thể xác cô nhớ. Đầu thì trống.' is a perfect triple-strike of body-before-emotion. The notebook entries' dry factual tone against devastating content works beautifully. But several passages explain what the body should simply show.

beat_coverage.weakest_moment: Tuấn đứng dậy. 'Anh đi đây.' — the departure feels slightly rushed given the emotional weight of his line
beat_coverage.fix: Add one beat of Tuấn pausing at the door, his hand on the frame, before he speaks about keeping the shirt. Give the silence after his exit line room to breathe before cutting to Linh alone.
beat_coverage.note: All five outline beats are present and dramatized rather than summarized. The notebook reading is given proper weight with actual entries shown. The 'Linh ngủ' reveal earns its impact through buildup. The final balcony scene is the chapter's strongest beat — quiet, physical, nothing resolved.

character_voice.weakest_moment: Linh's internal narration during the shirt scene: 'Không phải ký ức. Không có hình ảnh hiện lên. Không nhớ mình từng mặc áo này ở đâu, làm gì. Chỉ có cái nghẹn.'
character_voice.fix: This is too articulate for someone who supposedly thinks in sensations, not concepts. Replace with pure body: 'Trống. Nhưng cổ họng nghẹn. Mùi cũ — của ai — không biết. Da nhớ. Đầu không.' Let the fragments do the work.
character_voice.note: Lịch's whispered 'Mình nhớ đủ cho hai người. Nhưng mình mệt.' is devastating and perfectly in voice — the chronicle-keeper finally cracking. Tuấn's exit line is exactly right: exhausted hope offered one more time. The characters are differentiated, but Linh's internal voice occasionally becomes too eloquent for someone who 'thinks in sensations, not concepts.'

plants_seeded.weakest_moment: The smudged entry about the sixth chair — 'Ghế cuối bàn—' with the sentence trailing off into blurred ink
plants_seeded.fix: This is actually well done, but could be slightly more subtle. Instead of the sentence being visibly smudged (which draws attention), have the entry simply skip from 'Duy ngồi đầu bàn' to the next day — the absence of the sixth person rendered as absence in the text itself.
plants_seeded.note: Thread 14 (Lịch's love) is brilliantly planted through the crossed-out line and the 'Linh ngủ' entry — invisible until Linh reads it, then devastating. The dạ lan reference in the 1998 entry connects naturally to the ongoing investigation. The 'Ghế cuối bàn—trống' recurring line is effective unsettlement.

prose_quality.weakest_sentence: Câu hỏi nằm lại trong cổ họng, vị như nước sông Hương mùa lũ — lờ lợ, nuốt không trôi.
prose_quality.fix: The metaphor is overwrought and too perfectly constructed. The voice profile says body before emotion — keep it physical: 'Câu hỏi nằm lại trong cổ họng. Lờ lợ. Nuốt không trôi.' Drop the river comparison; the sensation speaks for itself.
prose_quality.strongest_sentence: Da cô nhớ. Thể xác cô nhớ. Đầu thì trống.
prose_quality.note: The notebook entries are a prose feat — dry, factual, crushing. 'Lịch nhìn Linh ngủ. Linh không biết.' is devastating simplicity. Sentence variety is generally strong. But the chapter leans on a few constructed metaphors that feel designed rather than lived. The ending's triple observation ('Nước mía nguội dần... Gừng còn cay... Mưa vẫn rỉ') is pretty but too balanced — real writing is lumpier.

continuity.note: Strong emotional continuity from Chapter 7's investigation scenes. Linh returns from Hương Thủy with new knowledge about the rain-caller, then is confronted with the intimate cost of what she's lost — the shift from external investigation to internal reckoning works. The dạ lan smell from previous chapters reappears naturally in the 1998 notebook entry. Linh's emotional state (determined but hollow) tracks perfectly.

violations: Tuấn's Rửa timeline ambiguity: Character registry states 'Lần thứ nhất (cuối 1994) lấy năm 1996' which is chronologically impossible if the Rửa happened in late 1994 — the chapter's 17/11/1996 date for Tuấn's second Rửa may be attempting to reconcile this but creates confusion about which Rửa took which year.

Notebook entry says Linh Rửa lần đầu on 15/8/1994, but canon says all six Rửa'd together during the rain at quán bà Tâm — the 14/8 entry describes the café gathering, suggesting the Rửa happened overnight between 14th and 15th. This is a reasonable interpretation but the 'cùng lúc' aspect of the original Rửa is slightly muddied.
canon_compliance.note: No major violations that break the reading experience. The timeline tensions appear to stem from ambiguities in the source material itself rather than chapter errors. The chapter handles the established facts (Rửa costs, memory losses, character histories) with care.

lore_integration.weakest_moment: The nước mía gốc appears with its established symbolic meaning ('vị của không muốn quên') but the meaning is not shown — only the drink arrives
lore_integration.fix: Have Linh taste it and register something about the combination — ginger's bite, the stubborn sweetness — that connects to the theme of holding on. One line of sensation would embed the lore rather than just displaying it.
lore_integration.note: The notebook itself is worldbuilding in action — Lịch's role as chronicler is not told but shown through the artifact. The dạ lan smell, the quỳnh flower, the empty chair, the memory-tax mechanics — all are doing emotional and thematic work, not just decorating. This is how lore should function.

engagement.weakest_moment: The middle section where Linh flips through multiple notebook entries — 'Lật thêm. Lật tiếp. Trang sau, trang sau' — risks becoming catalog rather than drama
engagement.fix: Compress the flipping montage. Select 2-3 entries that do the most emotional work and cut the rest. The reader doesn't need to see every year — they need to feel the weight accumulating. Trust the 'Mỗi trang một ngày' summary line to convey volume.
engagement.note: The 'Linh ngủ' reveal is a genuine surprise — the crossed-out line foreshadows it, but the entry itself lands with force. Tuấn's scene has tension (will she remember?) that resolves into something more painful than forgetting. The final balcony scene is the chapter's emotional peak — restrained, physical, nothing fixed. A reader would turn the page, but this is a quiet chapter by design.

three_weakest_sentences: Câu hỏi nằm lại trong cổ họng, vị như nước sông Hương mùa lũ — lờ lợ, nuốt không trôi.
Cái run từ bên trong, từ chỗ mà da thịt biết điều mà đầu chưa kịp hiểu.
Thấy gì đó mới mẻ. Chưa từng Rửa. Chưa từng bị nước chạm tới. Một thứ gì đó nhẹ nhàng, còn nguyên, chưa bị bào mòn.
three_strongest_sentences: Da cô nhớ. Thể xác cô nhớ. Đầu thì trống.
Lịch nhìn Linh ngủ. Linh không biết.
Mình nhớ đủ cho hai người. Nhưng mình mệt.
ai_patterns_detected: Emotional summary passages that explain what the reader should feel ('Cái run từ bên trong, từ chỗ mà da thịt biết điều mà đầu chưa kịp hiểu') rather than letting sensation stand alone
Slightly too-balanced closing paragraphs ('Nước mía nguội dần trong ly. Gừng còn cay. Mưa vẫn rỉ.') — three parallel observations in a row is a common AI rhythm pattern
The crossed-out line reveal is slightly over-telegraphed by the paragraph break and 'Rồi dừng' construction — a more human writer might embed it more casually
Several paragraphs follow the same structure: physical description → emotional beat → short punchy closer
weakest_dimension: voice_adherence — several passages explain emotions the body should simply show, violating the core 'body before emotion' principle
top_3_revisions: Cut all explanatory tags from emotional moments: 'Cái run từ bên trong...' becomes just the trembling hand; 'Không phải ký ức. Không có hình ảnh hiện lên...' becomes pure sensation fragments. Trust the body to communicate.

Compress the notebook-flipping montage by one-third. Select the 1994 first Rửa entry, the 1998 dạ lan entry, and the 'Linh ngủ' entry. Cut the 1996 and 1997 entries — they repeat the pattern without adding new information. The reader will feel the weight from fewer, sharper examples.

Break the balanced closing rhythm. The final balcony scene should be lumpier — let one observation linger longer, cut another short, leave something unfinished. 'Nước mía nguội dần. Mưa vẫn rỉ.' Drop the middle beat. Asymmetry feels more human.
new_canon_entries: Lịch giữ cuốn sổ da đen, bìa mòn mép, ghi bằng mực đỏ — mọi lần Rửa từ 1994 đến nay, bao gồm: ngày, giờ, ai bị, mất gì, thời tiết, mùi, vị trí ngồi, ai khóc, ai im
Mùi dạ lan pha trầm lần đầu được Lịch ghi nhận ngày 23/6/1998, đúng đêm Linh Rửa lần ba
Lịch đã gạch bỏ dòng 'năm mình nhận ra mình thương Linh' trong entry ngày 3/9/1995 — dấu vết tình cảm bị che giấu nhưng vẫn đọc được
Entry 'Linh ngủ' trong sổ Lịch viết bằng mực đỏ, không ghi sự kiện Rửa — chỉ ghi khoảnh khắc Lịch nhìn Linh ngủ và không nắm tay
Chiếc áo sơ mi xanh nhạt Tuấn đưa cho Linh là áo Linh mặc mùa hè 1995, vải mòn ở khuỷu, còn mùi giặt bột Tide và cà phê rớt cũ
Cây quỳnh trong chậu ban công phòng Linh đã tàn sau đêm Rửa Duy — hoa trắng rụng dưới gốc, héo xẹp trên đất ẩm
